reviews.body: very personal, well informed and products explained.

I've had a savings account for almost a year and as we all know we shouldn't use the same passwords and codes for more than one place or write them down. This means that if you have an account you don't access very often this can be very troublesome. So i needed a reminder of my username because a PC will not remember it when accessing the site, i then needed a password so i requested a reset, trying to use the reset you need your memorable word and it appears that i have remembered it incorrectly so i attempt to reset my memorable word and then bang. The account i can manage online means i have to call them the next day to regain access. I phoned the next morning and waited all day to be called back, they unlocked me and of course i had my username and a password reset link, it then asked me my memorable word which i don't have and when i clicked reset, i'm locked out again and have to get back on the phone but luckily the phone lines were still supposed to be open for another fifteen minutes but i got voicemail. So i will now be on day three tomorrow and all i'm trying to do now is close my account and run a mile.

We have a number of accounts at Leek B/S Their rates are competitive the ease of application and management of accounts is convenient and suits our requirements.  The staff also are very friendly, Rachael has always been most helpful in opening our accounts and other members of staff equally polite, professional and welcoming.
Staff always helpful and friendly when I come into branch.
Very good customer service. Friendly peps

I was greeted by a friendly man at the door who passed me to a young lady so I didn’t have to wait in the queue. The young lady on the desk was very helpful with my questions about updating my account.
Came in with inactive account, Cliff helped get this sorted so I can use my account again. He was very helpful in explaining what he was doing.
Efficient friendly staff always happy to help.
I love that it’s local and we have somewhere to go. Staff are always helpful and friendly.
Great support from staff with my maturity forms
Staff are always very friendly and helpful
